hero.headline: Distance Shouldn't Define Your Property's Quality.
hero.subheadline: Expert property management in Transylvania for remote owners and global investors.

services.heading: End-to-End Property Management
services.subheading: We handle every detail so you don't have to. From finding tenants to fixing leaks — we're your eyes and ears on the ground.
services.card1_desc: Professional listings, photography, and rigorous vetting to find reliable, long-term tenants.
services.card2_desc: Contract drafting, rent collection, and full compliance with Romanian property law.
services.card3_desc: Coordinating everything from minor repairs to full renovations with trusted local contractors.
services.card4_desc: We handle utility bills, taxes, and all local payments on your behalf — on time, every time.

trust.tagline: Fully serviced in English, Romanian, Hungarian & Spanish

why.heading: We Handle the What-ifs and the Late-Night Calls.
why.subheading: Owning property remotely shouldn't be stressful. Our family-run team is always on the ground, always reachable.
why.bullet1_desc: Something breaks at midnight? We're on it. Your tenants always have someone to call.
why.bullet2_desc: Regular inspections, photo reports, and transparent communication. You'll always know the state of your property.
why.bullet3_desc: From the first listing to the final bill — we manage everything so you can focus on life.

footer.tagline: Your eyes and ears on the ground in Târgu Mureș, Transylvania.

properties.heading: Featured Listings in Târgu Mureș
properties.subheading: Premium apartments available for rent, professionally managed by Velox Living.

property.widget_sub: Fill in the form and we'll get back to you within 24 hours.
